eligibility: Should not be covered under NPS, EPFO, ESIC or other statutory social security schemes
Should not be an income tax payer

money_benefits.government_contribution: Equal contribution by Central Government matching farmer contribution

application_process: Visit the nearest Common Service Centre (CSC).
Provide Aadhaar number, bank account details and land records.
Choose the monthly contribution amount based on age.
Auto-debit mandate is generated from the bank account.
After successful verification, enrollment is completed.
Receive a pension of ₹3000 per month after attaining 60 years of age.
benefits: Assured monthly pension of ₹3000 after 60 years
Family pension of 50% of pension amount to spouse after beneficiary's death
Government contributes an equal amount to the pension fund
Provides old-age financial security to farmers
scheme_details.implemented_by: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India
